channel.title: Power Automate on Automaly
channel.description: Recent content in Power Automate on Automaly
channel.managingEditor: luan52@outlook.com (Hi there, this is Max Nguyen)
channel.webMaster: luan52@outlook.com (Hi there, this is Max Nguyen)

item.title: Power Platform: Innovation across Apps, Automation & Portals
item.author: luan52@outlook.com (Hi there, this is Max Nguyen)
item.description: How Power Apps, Power Automate, and Power Pages turn low-code into something you describe in plain language and run with AI agents — covering generative pages, hyperautomation, and agentic portals.

item.title: All about Odata actions in Dynamics 365 Finance And Operations
item.author: luan52@outlook.com (Hi there, this is Max Nguyen)
item.description: Comprehensive guide to creating and using OData actions in D365 Finance Operations data entities including Power Automate integration and automation scenarios.

item.title: Dynamics 365 FinOps Data Integration using Microsoft Forms (Part 2)
item.author: luan52@outlook.com (Hi there, this is Max Nguyen)
item.description: Continue the Microsoft Forms integration series with advanced Power Automate flows and custom entity configurations for D365 Finance Operations data management.

item.title: Dynamics 365 FinOps Data Integration using Microsoft Forms (Part 1)
item.author: luan52@outlook.com (Hi there, this is Max Nguyen)
item.description: Learn how to integrate Microsoft Forms with Dynamics 365 Finance Operations using Power Automate and Data Entities for streamlined data collection and processing.
